notes: PCIe internal capture card (PCIe 2.0 x4 slot, x4/x8/x16 compatible) — the PCIe slot is the host connection, not a bracket-exposed I/O port, so it is omitted. The card draws power solely through the PCIe slot (rated ~6W); there is no external power connector. No USB, audio, or control ports exist on this card. HDMI 2.0 confirmed by multiple secondary sources; the official Elgato help page (primary source) returned HTTP 403 and could not be directly fetched, so confidence is medium. Model number: 10GAS9901.

ports.name: HDMI In
ports.note: Unencrypted HDMI 2.0 input; supports up to 2160p60 HDR10, 1440p144, 1080p240

ports.name: HDMI Out
ports.note: Lag-free HDMI 2.0 passthrough output; supports up to 2160p60 HDR10
